---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or pain point. Format that often works: "When I try to X, I have to Y, which is painful because Z."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen — CLI shape, expected behavior, output format, integration points.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches you've thought about, and why they don't work as well.

## Bowling format / footage type

If relevant: which bowling format(s) does this affect (PBA qualifying, Doubles, Baker, etc.)? Single-camera amateur footage, broadcast, something else?

## Trade-offs and risks

What might this break? What are the maintenance implications? Does it conflict with previously documented decisions in `docs/project/`?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant: links to related projects, sample data, mockups, prior art.
